source: Smelling Salts Review — extracted from conversation history line 82
name: Grace Concentric Circles — Expanding Awareness Architecture
description: Grace operates in expanding concentric circles of awareness. The innermost circle (3-mile radius around Ruby's home) is always on — persistent, cannot be turned off. Grace is always listening for need signals in Ruby's immediate neighborhood. The circles expand outward: city, province, globe — each with a different cadence and different types of signals.

circles.name: Neighborhood
circles.cadence: Always on — real-time, persistent, cannot be turned off
signal_types: Local resource availability (food bank, community event)
New Maven members joining in the neighborhood
circles.grace_behavior: Grace proactively surfaces neighborhood signals without being asked. 'Hey, your neighbor two blocks over just posted that she needs help with childcare this Saturday. Want me to connect you?'

circles.name: City
signal_types: Maven Movement milestones in the city
circles.grace_behavior: Grace surfaces city-level opportunities on a regular cadence. 'The city just announced a new utility rebate. I can help you apply — it takes 5 minutes.'

circles.name: Province
signal_types: Maven Movement growth across the province
circles.grace_behavior: Grace surfaces provincial signals when relevant. 'Alberta just changed the child benefit formula. Your payment goes up by $45 next month.'

circles.name: Globe
circles.grace_behavior: Grace surfaces global signals sparingly. 'The federal government just announced a new housing benefit. Here's what it means for you.'

persistent_neighborhood_monitoring.description: Circle 1 (neighborhood) is ALWAYS ON. Grace cannot be turned off for neighborhood signals. This is a design decision, not a bug.
persistent_neighborhood_monitoring.rationale: Ruby Red's most immediate needs are local. Her flat tire, her childcare gap, her grocery shortage — these are neighborhood problems that need neighborhood solutions. Grace must always be listening.
persistent_neighborhood_monitoring.opt_out: The only way to turn off neighborhood monitoring is to contact Maven directly. This is intentional — the value is in the ambient monitoring.

connection_to_barter_super_brain: The Barter Super-Brain uses Circle 1 data to match needs and capabilities across the neighborhood in real-time.
connection_to_ambient_presence: The Concentric Circles are the spatial dimension of Grace's Ambient Presence architecture.
